recentAddition: Faster R-CNN (Ren et al., NeurIPS 2015) - Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks. Introduced the Region Proposal Network (RPN) that shares convolutional features with detection networks, making region proposals nearly cost-free. Achieved 5 FPS on VGG-16 with 73.2% mAP on PASCAL VOC 2007. Foundation of modern two-stage object detectors.
